segments.title: Brownie Base
steps: Line the inside of a 8" loose bottom or springform cake tin with baking paper and spread butter on the inside of the baking paper. Set aside.
Melt the ['ing']{Dark chocolate} and ['ing']{Unsalted butter} in the microwave. Set aside.
Mix the ['ing']{Medium Eggs}, ['ing']{Caster sugar}, ['ing']{Light brown sugar} with an electric beater for 4 mins. It should be pale and creamy.
Fold in the chocolate butter mix with a spatula.
Sieve the ['ing']{Top flour}, ['ing']{Cocoa powder} and and ['ing']{Salt} together, add to the wet ingredient, fold in with spatula.
Pour the brownie mix into the lined pan. Place in the fridge for 10 minutes or until you are ready to pour the cheesecake layer on top.

segments.title: Salted Caramel Basque Cheesecake
steps: In a mixing bowl, mix the ['ing']{Cream cheese} until smooth. Add the ['ing']{Caster sugar}, mix until combined.
Add one ['ing']{Medium eggs} at a time, mix until just combined. Then, add the ['ing']{Dulce de leche} and ['ing']{Salt}, mix until combined using a spatula.

In a separate bowl add the sifted ['ing']{Top flour} and 150ml of the ['ing']{Whipping cream}. Mix together until smooth with no lumps. Add into the cheesecake mixture, mix until combined using a spatula.
Add the remaining whipping cream using a spatula.
Take the brownie layer out of the fridge. Once everything is smooth and combined, run the mixture through a sieve pushing it through with a spatula on top of the brownie layer.
Give the cake tin a tap on the counter to remove any bubbles, then bake in the oven at ['temp']{230} for 35 minutes.
Once baked, drizzle ['ing']{Salted caramel sauce} on top before serving.
